ip_outcome_note: Card name reads 'Blaze of Glory Son Gohan'. Character field confirmed as 'Son Gohan: GT'. Son Gohan is Goku's eldest son, established across Dragon Ball Z and GT. Identity unambiguous from the card name itself.

trivia_bullets.text: BT4-006 is a red Common Battle card: 15000 power, 5000 combo power, 2-red energy cost. Auto ability: when this card attacks or combos, if your Leader is red, place up to 3 cards from the top of your deck into your Drop Area — a self-mill trigger that feeds Drop Area strategies. Trait: Saiyan/Earthling, Era: Baby Saga, Character: Son Gohan: GT. [Source: WebSearch snippet via DBZ Exchange product listing BT4-006]

Son Gohan in Dragon Ball GT is notably de-powered relative to his peak in the Dragon Ball Z Cell Saga — he had abandoned martial arts training to become a scholar, and his GT appearances are mostly supportive. His appearance in BT4 Baby Saga cards reflects his role as a Z Fighter combatant against Baby's possession campaign. [Source: WebSearch snippet via Wikipedia: Majin Buu / Dragon Ball GT]

Gohan's card trait is listed as Saiyan/Earthling — the dual-race designation reflecting his half-human half-Saiyan biology, the same trait shared with daughter Pan (BT4-009) and GT Trunks (BT4-012). This trait cluster creates a 'hybrid lineage' subcategory within BT4's Baby Saga red pool. [Source: WebSearch snippets via DBZ Exchange, TCGPlayer product data]
